title:
Full stack developer
Full stack developer with verification
description:
About the job
Full stack Developer(Java developer)
What is it for you?
6 months with extension Contract
Location - Sydney
Competitive Remuneration
 What we need from you:
Banking industry experience of Minimum 5 years.
Relevant 8 years of working experience in developing application using Cloud Full Stack, Core java (preferably java 8 and above version), spring boot, hibernate, restful web services, Junit for unit testing and experience on ReactJS, Redux, SAGA Framework and NodeJS.
Should have strong technical and functional skills who has good understanding of the application and Client's environment and should be able to meet and coordinate with Business and End Users
Excellent communication skills and experience working with global teams.
 Why/About Our Client?
Our client offers a variety of benefits, including a strong focus on work-life balance, a diverse and inclusive work environment. Also known for its commitment to sustainability, community engagement, and innovation.
 What you'll do:
Strong Client service focus and willingness to respond to queries and provide deliverables within prompt timeframes.
Agile Methodology, Self-motivated, be able to work independently as well as being a team player.
Redux experience with JavaScript unit testing frameworks.
Experience on creating Node JS API for front-end integration.
Experience on creating API definition using Swagger.
Nice to have : Loadash, react selectors, styled components.
 How to Apply:
Talented, committed, can-do individuals have always been the cornerstone of this dynamic organization. If you have what it takes to thrive in this role and want to know more, please reach out to Rohit.sharma2@akkodisgroup.com or call +61 280 283 196.
 Why Join Akkodis?
Weekly Pay
No payrolling processing fees
Upskilling opportunities and training discounts
Associate gatherings events
AKKODIS SME meet ups/information sessions
EAP Support Program
Dedicated Account Management support team
 Privacy Statement:
Due to privacy laws regarding the collection and handling of personal information, all applications must be submitted online. Clicking the "Apply for this job" button below will direct you to our Online Centre, where you can review and agree to our Privacy and Consent statements before your details are formally lodged and processed.
Akkodis is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce and encourage applications from all backgrounds.
